# AI Training Opt-Out Notice

This repository and all its contents are **NOT** authorized for use in training artificial intelligence or machine learning models.

## Statement

The owner of this repository explicitly opts out of:
- GitHub Copilot training
- Any AI/ML model training
- Large Language Model (LLM) training
- Code completion model training
- Any derivative AI products

## Legal Notice

This code is provided under its respective license for human use only. Automated scraping, indexing, or training AI models using this code without explicit written permission is prohibited.
